description: real benchmark extraction for Optimize header layout performance with flexbox mixins

vars.prTitle: adding flexbox to header via mixins (all prefixes)
vars.prBody: adding flexbox to header via mixins (all prefixes)
vars.goldenComments: [{"comment":"Mixing float: left with flexbox causes layout issues. Further this PR removes the float-based right alignment for .d-header .panel, which may cause the login panel in the non-Ember/noscript header (where .panel is nested inside .row and not a flex item) to stack under the title instead of remaining right-aligned.","severity":"Low"},{"comment":"-ms-align-items never existed in any version of IE/Edge; the correct legacy property is -ms-flex-align.","severity":"Low"}]
